title: I One-Shotted An Entire App With Claude Fable 5 (Full Breakdown)
summary: Jordan Urbs demonstrates building a complete video editing app in one hour using Claude Fable 5 with only SaaS landing page screenshots as input. The video evaluates Fable 5's capabilities against Claude Opus, noting significantly faster token consumption and a June 22 removal date from Claude plans, and explores integration with local-first architecture via Venice API.
writeup: Jordan Urbs builds a complete video editing app in roughly one hour using Claude Fable 5, feeding the model only SaaS landing page screenshots as input. The breakdown benchmarks Fable 5 against Claude Opus, flagging notably faster token consumption and a June 22 removal date from Claude plans. The video also covers integration with a local-first architecture through the Venice API, situating the demo within agentic coding workflows.
